title: SystemVerilog: Compiler incorrectly rejects multiple procedural assignments to a variable bit/part when another bit/part of that variable is driven by a continuous assignment.

features.name: mixed continuous and procedural assignment to different bits of same vector
features.description: Code should include a logic vector where some bits are driven by continuous assignments and other non-overlapping bits are driven by procedural always blocks

features.name: indexed bit select in generate loop with genvar
features.description: Code should include a generate loop using genvar where different bits of the same vector are assigned via both continuous and procedural blocks
